scheme_name: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Training and Rehabilitation in Case of Permanent Disability due to Accident
page_title: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Training and Rehabilitation in Case of Permanent Disability due to Accident

details: The “Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Training and Rehabilitation in Case of Permanent Disability due to Accident” scheme has been launched by the Transport Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. aims to ensure the welfare and rehabilitation of registered transport vehicle drivers and conductors. The scheme aims to provide training and rehabilitation support to drivers and conductors who suffer permanent disability due to accidents, enabling them to regain livelihood opportunities.
benefits: Skill development training for alternative employment.
Rehabilitation support based on aptitude and interest assessment.
Training services are provided through Skill Development Mission–approved institutions.
eligibility: The applicant should be a permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should be a registered transport vehicle driver or conductor.
The applicant should possess a valid commercial driving or conductor license issued in Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should be registered on the Samagra Portal.
The applicant should have suffered permanent disability due to an accident.

offline: Click on the option “Register Family” or “Register Member”.
Enter the Aadhaar number and other required information.
Enter the OTP received on the registered mobile number.
Carefully fill in all the required details and upload the necessary documents.
Enter the captcha code and click on “Submit Application.”
Visit the nearest Lok Seva Kendra, MP Online Kiosk, or Common Service Center (CSC).
Provide the required documents and necessary information to complete the registration process.
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the District or Regional Transport Office.

documents_required: Permanent Disability Certificate (Issued by Authorized Medical Board)
Accident Details or Supporting Record (If required)

faqs.question: What is the purpose of this component?
faqs.answer: The scheme purpose to rehabilitate drivers and conductors who suffer permanent disability due to accidents.

faqs.question: Who can avail this benefit?
faqs.answer: Registered transport vehicle drivers and conductors with permanent disability.

faqs.question: Which department implements this component?
faqs.answer: The Transport Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: Is the benefit monetary in nature?
faqs.answer: No, the benefit is provided in the form of skill training.

faqs.question: Which agency provides the training?
faqs.answer: Training is provided under the State Skill Development Mission.

faqs.question: Is the benefit available for temporary disability?
faqs.answer: No, only permanent disability cases are eligible.

faqs.question: Who approves the benefit?
faqs.answer: The concerned District or Regional Transport Officer approves the benefit.

faqs.question: Can other states people apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only residents of Madhya Pradesh are eligible.

faqs.question: How Can I register for Samagra ID?
faqs.answer: The applicant visits the Samagra official website for the registration.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant submits the application at the District or Regional Transport Office (RTO) for verification and further processing.
